title: Planet Labs PBC (PL) Earnings Dates & Report
text:
Planet Labs PBC maintains a schedule of quarterly earnings reports that provide transparency on the company's financial performance and strategic progress. The company reported fiscal Q4 2026 results on March 19, 2026, with record revenue of $86.8 million and achievement of first full year profitability. The next earnings date for Planet Labs is scheduled for June 4, 2026 (Q1 2026 fiscal year results).

The company's earnings reports consistently demonstrate strong financial execution. Fiscal 2026 results showed revenue of $307.7 million (26% growth), adjusted EBITDA of $15.5 million profitability, and free cash flow of $52.9 million. These results validate the company's transition from pre-profitability venture to profitable growth company.

Earnings call participation provides additional insights into management's perspective on market opportunities and execution progress. CEO Will Marshall and CFO provide detailed commentary on segment performance, contract wins, and forward outlook. The Defense & Intelligence segment's 50%+ growth has been a key highlight, reflecting strong government demand.

Planet Labs' earnings provide updates on key business metrics including backlog, remaining performance obligations, and cash position. The $900 million backlog and $852 million remaining performance obligations provide visibility for revenue generation. The company's cash position of $640.1 million enables continued investment in satellite deployment and AI technology development.

Fiscal 2027 guidance of $415-440 million revenue reflects management confidence in backlog conversion and continued contract wins. Upcoming earnings dates offer opportunities to assess progress toward these targets and evaluate execution on major initiatives including satellite constellation expansion and NVIDIA AI partnership.
